changed_surfaces: internal/cli/cli.go: parsed optional long-run dashboard fields and emitted compact long-run readback lines
internal/cli/cli_test.go: added regression coverage for compact and JSON long-run mission dashboard output
examples/mission/dashboard.long-run.ready.json: added ready-node fixture with blocked final response
behavioral_summary: AO Command can now show compact long-run mission state, including node progress, lease minimums, checkpoint count, return gate, early-return risk, and final-response permission.
